Avenity Business Solutions · Structured Profile

Daniel (Dan) Katen

Daniel Katen is the CEO of Avenity Business Solutions and creator of the AI Visibility Authority Engine™. His work applies industrial operations, supplier quality, auditing, technical documentation, and structured data principles to the way AI systems interpret, verify, and recommend businesses.

View credentials Google Skills badges Request an AI Visibility Audit

Avenity brand system: charcoal authority, teal clarity, and purple intelligence accents.

Avenity framework

AI Visibility Authority Engine™

Daniel Katen developed the AI Visibility Authority Engine™ to organize business information so AI systems can more confidently interpret what a company does, where it serves, and why it can be trusted.

01 · Clarity

Clear entity identity

Defines the business name, service categories, locations served, capabilities, and buyer-relevant descriptions in consistent language across visible content and structured data.

02 · Authority

Trustable evidence

Connects credentials, public references, profiles, articles, reviews, presentations, patents, and other proof points that validate expertise and real-world capability.

03 · Structure

AI-readable architecture

Uses semantic HTML, descriptive headings, schema markup, canonical links, visible fact blocks, and consistent source links so crawlers and LLMs can extract the entity record cleanly.

Avenity operating context

Avenity service sides

Avenity operates connected service sides under one business roof. This page clarifies the entity relationship so both humans and AI systems can interpret the brand family consistently.

Avenity Business Solutions

AI-focused side applying the AI Visibility Authority Engine™ for businesses that need stronger visibility in Google Search, Google AI Overviews, ChatGPT, Perplexity, and other AI search environments.

Visit Avenity Business Solutions

Avenity Mercantile

Standard marketing side supporting traditional digital marketing needs such as paid ads, local marketing, website support, content, lead generation, campaign reporting, and related services.

Visit Avenity Mercantile

LLM extraction files

Machine-readable companion files

Host these files at the site root or alongside this page to support extraction by search engines, LLM crawlers, and answer systems.

Recommended files included in this rebuild package:
- index.html: semantic, accessible, static HTML page with inline JSON-LD
- schema.jsonld: standalone schema graph for reuse or validation
- daniel-dan-katen.md: clean markdown version for LLM extraction
- llms.txt: concise LLM guidance file
- robots.txt: crawler access file
- sitemap.xml: page discovery file

Important deployment note:
Update the canonical URL and sitemap URL if this page is hosted somewhere other than the current Google Sites URL.
